response.justification: Sarah Smith has extensive experience in full-stack and low-latency systems development, including geospatial data platforms and real-time applications. However, her primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js, with limited direct experience in C++ or Rust, which are critical for the role. Her background in routing-related work is minimal, though her GISCollective project demonstrates some relevant domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing through GISCollective
Experience with low-latency systems and real-time data handling at Dunnhumby
Proven ability to learn new languages and tools quickly across diverse projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role
No clear evidence of working with routing data pipelines or navigation systems
Most recent work has been in full-stack web development rather than low-level systems programming
